hero.headline:
An AI-native team delivers more, 
faster and at higher quality.
hero.subheadline: AI is woven into every project. Faster delivery, higher quality, lower cost.

items.title: AI-native process
items.description: AI is built into how we work not added as an afterthought. This means faster development and higher quality.

items.title: Finland's sharpest talent
items.description: Every consultant has passed a rigorous hiring process. No compromises on expertise.

items.title: Partner, not vendor
items.description: We don't just execute tickets. We understand your business and build solutions that create competitive advantage.

pillar1.title: AI-native software development
pillar1.description: We build enterprise information systems. From e-commerce to backend infrastructure no compromises on quality.

pillar2.title: Applied AI Engineering
pillar2.description: We help companies integrate AI into their existing systems, products and services.

pillar3.title: Modernisation & integrations
pillar3.description: Technical debt is cheap to accumulate and many have it we help pay it down. We modernise legacy information systems for the new era.

ura.title: Want to build software in a way that isn't taught in schools yet?

items.title: The latest tools
items.description: AI-native development tools are our everyday. Here you get to use tomorrow's technology today.

items.title: Demanding team
items.description: Colleagues who raise your bar. Mediocrity doesn't survive here.

items.title: Growing company
items.description: Shape the direction and culture. This isn't a big machine this is a growth story.

yhteydenotto.title: Tell us about your project.
yhteydenotto.subtitle: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

pekka.name: Pekka Mattinen
pekka.quote: Let's skip the formalities just drop me a message.

step1.headline: Let's build something better, together.
step1.sub: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No commitment, no pitch. Just an honest conversation about how we can help.

step2.headline: What's your main challenge?
step2.sub: Pick the closest match. We'll tailor the call to your situation.

options.label: I need a new software system
I want AI integrated into my business
Legacy system is slowing us down

step3.headline: Book your call
step3.sub: We'll reach out within 24 hours to schedule the call.
step3.trust: No commitment. We respond within 24 hours.

step4.headline: Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.
step4.sub: Pekka will reach out within 24 hours to find a time that works.
step4.next1: Pekka calls at the agreed time
step4.calendarCta: Or book directly in the calendar
